goal: Teach scientific concepts and life skills to children (ages 5-13) through engaging stories and poems
vision: Children learn complex concepts naturally through the joy of storytelling
problemSolved: Traditional education is dry and unengaging for children; stories make learning memorable
usp: Story-driven learning that teaches science, logic, and emotional intelligence through narrative
mvp: Story books for ages 5-9 (basic science, curiosity, emotional learning)
Story books for ages 8-10 (intermediate science, reasoning, problem-solving)
Story books for ages 10-13 (advanced science, CS fundamentals, AI concepts)
Poetry collections for each age group
Self-improvement books for mindset and habits

validation.methodology: Parent reviews, classroom adoption, comprehension testing
validation.successCriteria: 4.5+ star rating, adoption in 10+ schools, demonstrated learning outcomes
